repo_root_resolution.notes: Windows-native OpenClaw may still need to interoperate with WSL-visible paths.

binding_discovery.notes: Machine-local bindings may exist outside the repo; runtime should not assume they are present.

fail_closed_rules: If runtime identity sources are missing, do not infer permissions.
If personal user binding is absent, remain in core-only or runtime-only mode.
If machine-local binding paths are ambiguous, escalate rather than guessing.
notes: Example bootstrap contract only. Not an authority grant.
